name: This...is Chili
recipeIngredient: 3 cups cooked pinto beans, rinsed and drained
2 cups cheddar cheese, grated (jack or other sharp cheeses work as well)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the shortening in a large skillet over medium flame.
2. Add the onions and garlic; cook, stirring occasionally, for 4-5 minutes until softened but not browned.
3. Stir in the ground beef and pork; continue cooking until all pinkness is gone.
4. Stir in the canned tomatoes (with juices), tomato paste, oregano, cumin, bay leaf, and cooked pinto beans.
5. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer, covered, for 2 hours.
6. Uncover and simmer another 1-2 hours until thickened to your desired consistency.
7. Turn off the heat. Serve hot, garnished with grated cheese and sliced scallions.
